title: viola ruppii var. pumiliformis
intro: Viola ruppii var. pumiliformis, also known as the alpine pansy, is a perennial plant species in the viola genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been utilized in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Viola ruppii var. pumiliformis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
